accept: accepted current task closes and commits before the destination starts
verified checkpoint commits then pauses the source before the destination starts
uncommittable work writes H3 and requires continue-current or dirty-fork
closed-task dirty ownership blocks ordinary start and next --go
pre-existing unrelated changes are fingerprinted and excluded from new-task attribution
dirty-fork preserves one active task and records the carried baseline
no switch or closeout path runs git push
